mapper.select: SELECT wiki_id, project_id, parent_wiki_id, title, summary, current_version_no, edit_availble_yn, editing_user_id, editing_start_at, editing_expires_at, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at FROM wiki_page WHERE wiki_id = #{wikiId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'WIKI_PAGE_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMM') || '_' || LPAD( NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(wiki_id, -4))), 0) + 1, 4, '0' ) FROM wiki_page WHERE wiki_id LIKE 'WIKI_PAGE_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMM') || '_%'
INSERT INTO wiki_page ( wiki_id, project_id, parent_wiki_id, title, summary, current_version_no, edit_availble_yn, created_by, created_at ) VALUES ( #{wikiId}, #{projectId}, #{parentWikiId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{currentVersionNo}, 'Y', #{createdBy}, SYSDATE )

SELECT 'WIKI_VERSION_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMM') || '_' || LPAD( NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(version_id, -4))), 0) + 1, 4, '0' ) FROM wiki_version WHERE version_id LIKE 'WIKI_VERSION_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMM') || '_%'
INSERT INTO wiki_version ( version_id, wiki_id, version_no, title, content, change_summary, created_by, created_at ) VALUES ( #{versionId}, #{wikiId}, #{versionNo}, #{title}, #{content}, #{changeSummary}, #{createdBy}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT version_id, wiki_id, version_no, title, content, change_summary, created_by, created_at FROM ( SELECT version_id, wiki_id, version_no, title, content, change_summary, created_by, created_at FROM wiki_version WHERE wiki_id = #{wikiId} ORDER BY created_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT version_id, wiki_id, version_no, title, change_summary, created_by, created_at FROM wiki_version WHERE wiki_id = #{wikiId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT version_id, wiki_id, version_no, title, content, change_summary, created_by, created_at FROM wiki_version WHERE version_id = #{versionId}

SELECT w.wiki_id, w.project_id, w.title, w.summary, w.created_by, w.created_at, u.user_name FROM wiki_page w LEFT JOIN users u ON w.created_by = u.user_id WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
